events.summary: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis (series ends 1/5/2...)

prep.summary: You finalized the Arvy Prep strategy — standardizing the slide templates to focus on business value and limiting each portfolio presentation to a strict five minutes. You must also address critical unresolved issues from your June 29 meeting with Mike — specifically the staffing shortages, the locked application rationalization spreadsheet, and the unusable property loss model.
tasks: Submit your succession planning recommendations for both your role and James's role to Mike.
Address the unusable property loss model by securing a dedicated data architect — specifically pursuing the part-time return of Chris.
Identify any critical P&C updates that must still be pushed to the locked application rationalization spreadsheet to leverage the hygiene fund.
Resolve the outstanding category 3 control test failure identified during the June 29 briefing.
Convert all outstanding Arvy overview slides into the newly mandated portfolio value template before the scheduled dress rehearsal.
prep.title: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis (series ends 1/5/2...)

events.summary: Just In Time (JIT) Training Opportunity: IAM Security Cat...

prep.summary: You must finalize several outstanding action items from the mid-July Arvy prep sessions—specifically converting your portfolio slides to the new standardized template and uploading the master deck to the Tech Fellows Box folder. You also need to confirm your alignment on the five-minute-per-portfolio constraint—necessary to stay within the strict time limits set for the RV review—and verify that the dry run rehearsal is scheduled. Completing these pending items will ensure you have officially finished your prep work.
tasks: Convert all remaining presentation slides to the standardized portfolio template format before the final dry run.
Upload the finalized presentation deck to the designated Tech Fellows Box folder.
Coordinate the scheduling of the mandatory dress rehearsal with all Tech Fellows.
Rename the 'portfolio description' slide section to 'portfolio value' to better emphasize business impact.
prep.title: Bi-weekly: Tech BoD (series ending 12/22/26)
